rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that mapsTo_fiber, mapsTo_fiber_symm, and fiberHomeomorph are unnecessarily restricted to singleton preimages — the proofs work identically for any s : Set B, and the eq_comm in fiberHomeomorph confirms the singleton restriction adds complexity rather than reducing it. Acting on Review 2 produces a strictly more general API; Review 1's assertion that the lemmas are 'at the right generality' is simply wrong on this specific point.
